title: callicarpa ruptofoliata
intro: Callicarpa ruptofoliata, also known as Purple Passionflower or Purple Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa ruptofoliata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
